welcome.subtitle: I learn how long things really take you, then show you the honest number. No more planning around a guess.
welcome.footer: No account, no email. Everything stays on this phone.

categories.title: Where does time slip most?
categories.subtitle: Pick a few. I'll sharpen your honest number here first.

pickedLine.plenty: {{count}} picked. That's plenty to learn from.
pickedLine.coupleMore: {{count}} picked. A couple more and I'll learn your pace faster.
pickedLine.oneMore: {{count}} picked. One more and I'll learn your pace faster.

quiz.subtext: No right answer here. Pick what's true most days, and I'll learn from it.

pace.prompt: When you plan your day, things usually take…

sink.prompt: Where does time run away from you most?

ready.title: One tap to start. One tap to ripen.
ready.subtitle: From your first guess, I'll show honest times. Each task you log makes them sharper, and I'll never scold you for a gap.
ready.trailCaption: Your accuracy ripens as you log. It only ever ripens — no streak to break.
ready.footer: Empty days are fine. Forgot to time something? Add it in one tap.

archetypeReveal.note: A first read from your answers. Every task you time makes it sharper — and your type can move as your numbers do.

steady.title: The Steady Reader
steady.blurb: Your guesses already land close to reality. I'll sharpen this with every task you log.

gentle.title: The Gentle Optimist
gentle.blurb: You lean hopeful, then mostly catch up. A little padding does it.

sprint.title: The Sprint Optimist
sprint.blurb: Your mind moves fast; the doing takes a touch longer. Now you know by how much.

dreamer.title: The Dreamer
dreamer.blurb: Big plans, generous timelines. Your honest numbers keep them grounded.
